posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently the long-text columns are set at 2000 characters. Sometimes we want shorter. Having the ability to configure the character or even word limits.

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to configure the character limit of long-text columns.
